curation_method: stub — symbols listed below need hand-curation against the pinned checkout, followed by second-pair-of-eyes verification per tests/coverage/CONVENTIONS.md.
caveats: Protocol-default-implementation witnesses are out of scope for v1.1.x. TCA makes heavy use of macros and protocol-oriented design, so ground truth here should flag any site where we deliberately omitted witnesses in `excluded_ranges` below.
Macro-generated call sites are the LSP reconciliation layer's job. Ground truth records only what indexstore can reach; LSP-only ranges land under the yellow-lsp-only tier at runtime.
Every entry in `symbols` starts with `needs_verification: true`. Flip to false only after a reviewer has inspected the checkout and confirmed the expected_ranges are exhaustive for the symbol.

symbols.description: STUB — needs ground truth curation against the pinned TCA checkout. Left as an empty-expected-ranges sentinel so the harness builds + resolves the USR but treats the coverage number as informational until filled in.
